theory.canonical_statement: ID5464 records Toroidal Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\addidional-lemmas\TZP-C.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $. \begin{equation} \ddot{\mathbf{\Psi}} + \kappa \mathbf{\Psi} = 0 \end{equation} Projecting this 4D harmonic motion into 3D space via stereographic mapping reveals a toroidal topology. The "twist" inherent in the projected trajectory provides a geometric basis for the $
canonical_equation.source_section_latex: $. \begin{equation} \ddot{\mathbf{\Psi}} + \kappa \mathbf{\Psi} = 0 \end{equation} Projecting this 4D harmonic motion into 3D space via stereographic mapping reveals a toroidal topology. The "twist" inherent in the projected trajectory provides a geometric basis for the $
